name: venom-chat-executor
description: Execution-first chat participant for deterministic local git status in VS Code chat.

chatParticipants.name: venom-exec
chatParticipants.description: Deterministic local command execution participant for git status workflow.

chatParticipants.name: venom-agent
chatParticipants.description: Routes git-status intent to execution tool and returns final response with evidence.

languageModelTools.name: run_git_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a local workspace command with strict allowlist. Use for repo-truth checks such as git status.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run local git read-only command and return exact output.

command.description: Command to execute in workspace root.

venom.execution.repoRoot.description: Absolute repository root used by Venom execution tool. If empty, extension tries git rev-parse from current workspace.
